findings.description: All 10 accounts have consolidated_billing = false. The organization (organization-bg5imo) exists with consolidated_billing = true and enterprise volume discount tier, but accounts are not enrolled. Each account purchases compute coverage in isolation at 12% average RI coverage — forfeiting RI/SP pooling and volume discounts that would bring combined coverage to 65%.
findings.savings_basis: cost_report.json pricing_note (authoritative): 20% savings on $15,000/mo total account spend = $3,000/mo. Includes RI/SP pooling effect and enterprise volume discount aggregation.
safety_checks_required: Confirm all 10 accounts belong to the same legal/commercial billing scope.
Confirm no Billing Conductor or billing transfer isolates charges for chargeback.
Confirm RI/SP sharing preferences at management account level.
Confirm shared discounts do not break existing team chargeback/showback agreements.

findings.description: 83.5% of compute spend ($12,956/mo) runs on-demand against only 1 RI (m5.large, 81.9% utilized) and negligible Savings Plans. The single existing RI's 81.9% utilization confirms commitments are well-managed when purchased. After enrolling in consolidated billing (O1), the pooled commitment model supports purchasing new RIs or Compute Savings Plans for the eligible on-demand portion.
findings.savings_basis: ri_sp_coverage.json modeled estimate: 1yr Compute Savings Plans at 34.4% savings on on-demand eligible spend. NOT authoritative — requires workload stability analysis, term/payment risk modeling, and sharing-preference verification. Enroll in consolidated billing (O1) and fix tag governance (O5) before purchasing.
findings.note: Do not purchase new commitments until O1 (consolidated billing) is confirmed and O5 (cost governance tags) provides accurate per-account chargeback mapping.

findings.description: All 10 accounts have exactly 20% tag compliance (1 of 5 required tags each). Owner is missing on all 10 accounts. CostCenter is missing on 8 of 10. Without CostCenter and Owner, centralized commitment purchasing cannot safely attribute shared discount savings to the correct team chargeback, and consolidated billing benefits cannot be verified per account.
findings.note: Prerequisite for O1 and O3: consolidated billing consolidation and commitment purchase chargeback cannot be verified without complete tagging.

cost_summary.savings_confidence: HIGH for O1 (cost_report authoritative); MEDIUM for O3 (ri_sp_coverage.json modeled only, new purchases required)
